raw_consumer_statement:
I was told that I spoke to someone from a company that told me I was being overcharged on the interest on my XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX and XXXX cards. At the time I had no balance on the XXXX XXXX card. They withdrew {$7500.00}. from my XXXX XXXX account and {$5700.00}. from my XXXX XXXX account. I did not authorize these charges. I don't know who they spoke to, but it wasn't me. 
I have already contacted both XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX and they continue to keep these charges on my accounts.

After this all happened, I called all 3 accounts to ask about this issue of overcharging, and they indicated they had never called me about that issue.

Clearly, this is a fraud and I should not be held responsible. 
Thank you, XXXX XXXX
